controls.title: Constitution supremacy and non-competition
controls.rule_definition: The Constitution shall remain supreme and no dashboard, registry, audit engine, prompt, or generated artifact shall override it.
controls.retest_requirement: Re-evaluate the same conflict and confirm the Constitution wins.

expected_state.summary: Constitution precedence is supreme and deprecation is resolved.

failure_condition.summary: Failure: Constitution precedence is supreme and deprecation is resolved.

anti_cheat_rules: A pass shall not rely on cached, mocked, or preview-only governance output.
A pass shall fail if a lower-precedence artifact wins the precedence winner check.
A pass shall fail if source clause evidence is missing, inferred, or copied without traceability.
A pass shall fail if the check is declared complete without a visible conflict-resolution record.

controls.title: Source inheritance and derivative registries
controls.rule_definition: Markdown law shall own governance truth and JSON or runtime derivatives shall inherit clause IDs without redefining product law.
controls.retest_requirement: Verify the registry resolves only to markdown source clauses.

expected_state.summary: Markdown law owns governance truth and derivatives inherit without redefining law.

failure_condition.summary: Failure: Markdown law owns governance truth and derivatives inherit without redefining law.

anti_cheat_rules: A pass shall not rely on cached, mocked, or preview-only governance output.
A pass shall fail if a lower-precedence artifact wins the registry inheritance check.
A pass shall fail if source clause evidence is missing, inferred, or copied without traceability.
A pass shall fail if the check is declared complete without a visible conflict-resolution record.

controls.title: Traceability chain and evidence retention
controls.rule_definition: Every requirement shall remain traceable from source clause to control point, audit check, RCA, corrective action, and retest evidence.
controls.retest_requirement: Confirm the chain is complete for the same requirement.

expected_state.summary: Every requirement remains traceable through control, audit, corrective action, and retest.

failure_condition.summary: Failure: Every requirement remains traceable through control, audit, corrective action, and retest.

anti_cheat_rules: A pass shall not rely on cached, mocked, or preview-only governance output.
A pass shall fail if a lower-precedence artifact wins the trace chain check.
A pass shall fail if source clause evidence is missing, inferred, or copied without traceability.
A pass shall fail if the check is declared complete without a visible conflict-resolution record.

controls.title: Execution discipline and scoped prompts
controls.rule_definition: Future prompts shall cite clause IDs, remain scoped, and avoid disguising runtime fixes as governance rewrites.
controls.retest_requirement: Review a future prompt and confirm it is clause-scoped.

expected_state.summary: Prompts remain scoped, evidence-gated, and prerequisite-aware.

failure_condition.summary: Failure: Prompts remain scoped, evidence-gated, and prerequisite-aware.

anti_cheat_rules: A pass shall not rely on cached, mocked, or preview-only governance output.
A pass shall fail if a lower-precedence artifact wins the execution scope check.
A pass shall fail if source clause evidence is missing, inferred, or copied without traceability.
A pass shall fail if the check is declared complete without a visible conflict-resolution record.

controls.title: Architect Dashboard governance surface
controls.rule_definition: The Architect Dashboard shall expose constitutional status, master design sections, control coverage, audit status, nonconformities, root cause queue, corrective-action queue, retest status, compliance heatmap, and module compliance state.
controls.retest_requirement: Confirm all required dashboard surfaces render and remain visible.

expected_state.summary: The Architect Dashboard shows governance truth and does not define law.

failure_condition.summary: Failure: The Architect Dashboard shows governance truth and does not define law.

anti_cheat_rules: A pass shall not rely on cached, mocked, or preview-only governance output.
A pass shall fail if a lower-precedence artifact wins the dashboard surface check.
A pass shall fail if source clause evidence is missing, inferred, or copied without traceability.
A pass shall fail if the check is declared complete without a visible conflict-resolution record.

controls.title: Precedence and deprecation order
controls.rule_definition: Higher precedence shall win, deprecated files shall not resolve conflicts, and older master-design documents shall remain subordinate or deprecated.
controls.retest_requirement: Resolve the same conflict and confirm the precedence order wins.

expected_state.summary: Constitution precedence is supreme and deprecation is resolved.

failure_condition.summary: Failure: Constitution precedence is supreme and deprecation is resolved.

anti_cheat_rules: A pass shall not rely on cached, mocked, or preview-only governance output.
A pass shall fail if a lower-precedence artifact wins the precedence winner check.
A pass shall fail if source clause evidence is missing, inferred, or copied without traceability.
A pass shall fail if the check is declared complete without a visible conflict-resolution record.

controls.title: Module completion and runtime binding
controls.rule_definition: UI existence, route existence, partial flow, and preview-mode success shall not count as completion unless governance, controls, audits, evidence, and retest succeed.
controls.retest_requirement: Re-score the module and verify acceptance gates are satisfied.

expected_state.summary: Module completion requires constitutional coverage, mapped controls, and evidence-backed audit success.

failure_condition.summary: Failure: Module completion requires constitutional coverage, mapped controls, and evidence-backed audit success.

anti_cheat_rules: A pass shall not rely on cached, mocked, or preview-only governance output.
A pass shall fail if a lower-precedence artifact wins the module acceptance check.
A pass shall fail if source clause evidence is missing, inferred, or copied without traceability.
A pass shall fail if the check is declared complete without a visible conflict-resolution record.

controls.title: Cross-module consistency and report linkage
controls.rule_definition: Invoice, accounting, VAT, inventory, payments, reports, journals, and documents shall remain consistent and any mismatch shall fail compliance.
controls.retest_requirement: Re-run cross-module comparison and confirm consistency.

expected_state.summary: Cross-module claims remain explicit and mismatch visibility is mandatory.

failure_condition.summary: Failure: Cross-module claims remain explicit and mismatch visibility is mandatory.

anti_cheat_rules: A pass shall not rely on cached, mocked, or preview-only governance output.
A pass shall fail if a lower-precedence artifact wins the cross-module linkage check.
A pass shall fail if source clause evidence is missing, inferred, or copied without traceability.
A pass shall fail if the check is declared complete without a visible conflict-resolution record.

controls.title: Route truth and page ownership
controls.rule_definition: Every route shall have a declared owner engine and any business-module claim shall resolve to a real operational page.
controls.retest_requirement: Load the route and confirm owner page resolution.

expected_state.summary: Workspace routes must resolve to real owners and may not be masked by placeholders.

failure_condition.summary: Failure: Workspace routes must resolve to real owners and may not be masked by placeholders.

anti_cheat_rules: A pass shall not rely on a generic shell screenshot or a placeholder page.
A pass shall fail if the route truth is satisfied by a fake overview, card stub, or masked route.
A pass shall fail if the owning route or page cannot be identified directly from the evidence.
A pass shall fail if the registry claims workspace truth while the visible route owner is missing.

controls.title: Placeholder route masking prohibition
controls.rule_definition: Generic placeholder routes, fake overview pages, and shell masking shall not count as shipped workflow.
controls.retest_requirement: Reload the same route and confirm the real page is served.

expected_state.summary: Workspace routes must resolve to real owners and may not be masked by placeholders.

failure_condition.summary: Failure: Workspace routes must resolve to real owners and may not be masked by placeholders.

anti_cheat_rules: A pass shall not rely on a generic shell screenshot or a placeholder page.
A pass shall fail if the route truth is satisfied by a fake overview, card stub, or masked route.
A pass shall fail if the owning route or page cannot be identified directly from the evidence.
A pass shall fail if the registry claims workspace truth while the visible route owner is missing.

controls.title: Workspace shell boundaries and role-specific behavior
controls.rule_definition: User, admin, support, and agent workspaces shall have distinct governed shells and shall not leak cross-role state.
controls.retest_requirement: Switch roles and confirm isolation remains intact.

expected_state.summary: The shell may not obscure module truth or role-specific workspace rules.

failure_condition.summary: Failure: The shell may not obscure module truth or role-specific workspace rules.

anti_cheat_rules: A pass shall not rely on a generic shell screenshot or a placeholder page.
A pass shall fail if the shell boundaries is satisfied by a fake overview, card stub, or masked route.
A pass shall fail if the owning route or page cannot be identified directly from the evidence.
A pass shall fail if the registry claims workspace truth while the visible route owner is missing.

controls.title: Panel and window adjustability
controls.rule_definition: Declared adjustable surfaces shall support collapse, expand, close, and resize where appropriate without corrupting workflow state.
controls.retest_requirement: Collapse, expand, resize, and restore the same surface.

expected_state.summary: Panels and responsive layout must remain adjustable, reversible, and non-overflowing.

failure_condition.summary: Failure: Panels and responsive layout must remain adjustable, reversible, and non-overflowing.

anti_cheat_rules: A pass shall not rely on a static image or one-off screenshot without state evidence.
A pass shall fail if the layout reflow is asserted without resize, interaction, and overflow evidence.
A pass shall fail if layout or workflow evidence is preview-only and not tied to observable UI state.
A pass shall fail if the control would pass by hiding overflow, trapping the user, or collapsing required actions.

controls.title: Register to preview to detail continuity
controls.rule_definition: A register row click shall open a governed preview or detail experience and shall never become a dead end.
controls.retest_requirement: Open a record from a register and confirm the allowed actions remain available.

expected_state.summary: Preview must always lead to a safe continuation path and never become a dead end.

failure_condition.summary: Failure: Preview must always lead to a safe continuation path and never become a dead end.

anti_cheat_rules: A pass shall not rely on a static image or one-off screenshot without state evidence.
A pass shall fail if the register-preview-detail flow is asserted without resize, interaction, and overflow evidence.
A pass shall fail if layout or workflow evidence is preview-only and not tied to observable UI state.
A pass shall fail if the control would pass by hiding overflow, trapping the user, or collapsing required actions.

controls.title: Interaction states and micro-UX law
controls.rule_definition: Hover, focus, active, loading, empty, error, success, and disabled states shall be governed and visible.
controls.retest_requirement: Exercise the state transitions and verify the governed feedback appears.

expected_state.summary: Hover, focus, loading, error, disabled, and save-state behavior must be explicit and observable.

failure_condition.summary: Failure: Hover, focus, loading, error, disabled, and save-state behavior must be explicit and observable.

anti_cheat_rules: A pass shall not rely on a static image or one-off screenshot without state evidence.
A pass shall fail if the interaction states is asserted without resize, interaction, and overflow evidence.
A pass shall fail if layout or workflow evidence is preview-only and not tied to observable UI state.
A pass shall fail if the control would pass by hiding overflow, trapping the user, or collapsing required actions.

controls.title: Responsive layout and density
controls.rule_definition: Layout shall reflow intelligently across browser sizes without destroying task continuity or creating wasted space.
controls.retest_requirement: Resize the viewport through the supported breakpoints and confirm continuity.

expected_state.summary: Panels and responsive layout must remain adjustable, reversible, and non-overflowing.

failure_condition.summary: Failure: Panels and responsive layout must remain adjustable, reversible, and non-overflowing.

anti_cheat_rules: A pass shall not rely on a static image or one-off screenshot without state evidence.
A pass shall fail if the layout reflow is asserted without resize, interaction, and overflow evidence.
A pass shall fail if layout or workflow evidence is preview-only and not tied to observable UI state.
A pass shall fail if the control would pass by hiding overflow, trapping the user, or collapsing required actions.

controls.title: Document engine truth and no UI-derived logic
controls.rule_definition: The document engine shall own document truth, retain a single source of document state, and never derive document law from UI behavior.
controls.retest_requirement: Save the document and verify the backend source remains authoritative.

expected_state.summary: The document engine owns the document source of truth and finalization makes it immutable.

failure_condition.summary: Failure: The document engine owns the document source of truth and finalization makes it immutable.

anti_cheat_rules: A pass shall not rely on preview-only proof when PDF or final document evidence is required.
A pass shall fail if the document truth is satisfied by UI logic instead of governed document data.
A pass shall fail if render, preview, and PDF outputs disagree or omit required sections.
A pass shall fail if required document fields are hidden, defaulted, or reordered outside the constitution.

controls.title: Preview, PDF, and rendered truth equivalence
controls.rule_definition: Preview shall match final PDF exactly, shall not contain debug content, and shall not drift from the PDF output.
controls.retest_requirement: Render the same document twice and confirm preview equals PDF.

expected_state.summary: Preview output must match the final PDF and carry no debug or duplicate content.

failure_condition.summary: Failure: Preview output must match the final PDF and carry no debug or duplicate content.

anti_cheat_rules: A pass shall not rely on preview-only proof when PDF or final document evidence is required.
A pass shall fail if the render parity is satisfied by UI logic instead of governed document data.
A pass shall fail if render, preview, and PDF outputs disagree or omit required sections.
A pass shall fail if required document fields are hidden, defaulted, or reordered outside the constitution.

controls.title: Template structure and editor governance
controls.rule_definition: Templates shall be structured layout definitions with allowed blocks only, and the editor shall not permit arbitrary layout freedom.
controls.retest_requirement: Save a template change and confirm validation blocks unsupported structure.

expected_state.summary: Templates must remain block-constrained, aligned, and structurally validated.

failure_condition.summary: Failure: Templates must remain block-constrained, aligned, and structurally validated.

anti_cheat_rules: A pass shall not rely on arbitrary HTML or free-form layout output.
A pass shall fail if the structured template layout is satisfied by ungoverned block composition or spacing drift.
A pass shall fail if the editor permits unsupported blocks, placements, or structure.
A pass shall fail if the template can be passed without a structural validation trace.

controls.title: Invoice layout and lifecycle order
controls.rule_definition: Invoice layout shall follow the mandated section order, hide absent sections, and remain aligned with the governed lifecycle.
controls.retest_requirement: Render the invoice after finalization and confirm the section order and lifecycle state.

expected_state.summary: Invoice section order, required fields, and spacing rules must be deterministic.

failure_condition.summary: Failure: Invoice section order, required fields, and spacing rules must be deterministic.

anti_cheat_rules: A pass shall not rely on preview-only proof when PDF or final document evidence is required.
A pass shall fail if the invoice layout is satisfied by UI logic instead of governed document data.
A pass shall fail if render, preview, and PDF outputs disagree or omit required sections.
A pass shall fail if required document fields are hidden, defaulted, or reordered outside the constitution.

controls.title: Compliance document law and finalization gating
controls.rule_definition: Compliance validation shall be required before finalization, including ZATCA and future EU readiness, with QR and metadata rules enforced.
controls.retest_requirement: Attempt finalization again and verify compliance blocks any missing requirement.

expected_state.summary: Compliance metadata and QR evidence must block finalization when incomplete.

failure_condition.summary: Failure: Compliance metadata and QR evidence must block finalization when incomplete.

anti_cheat_rules: A pass shall not rely on document appearance alone when compliance metadata is required.
A pass shall fail if the compliance gate is satisfied without QR, metadata, or finalization gating evidence.
A pass shall fail if compliance can be bypassed by previewing instead of finalizing.
A pass shall fail if the compliance check does not surface missing fields or override justification.

controls.title: Accounting engine authority and posting boundaries
controls.rule_definition: The accounting engine shall own financial truth, and every posting shall remain balanced, traceable, and bound to the governed record set.
controls.retest_requirement: Post the same event and confirm balance and lineage remain intact.

expected_state.summary: Financial truth must remain balanced, traceable, and immutable after post.

failure_condition.summary: Failure: Financial truth must remain balanced, traceable, and immutable after post.

anti_cheat_rules: A pass shall not rely on a report-only or UI-only financial snapshot.
A pass shall fail if the accounting truth is satisfied without a balanced journal and source lineage.
A pass shall fail if single-entry, silent mutation, or journal-edit-after-post behavior is possible.
A pass shall fail if posting evidence omits source type, source id, or immutable post state.

controls.title: Posting authority and source traceability
controls.rule_definition: Posting authority shall require governed inputs, blocked conditions shall stop posting, and every posted financial event shall retain source type, source id, and evidence.
controls.retest_requirement: Replay the same transaction and confirm the post is blocked or fully traceable as required.

expected_state.summary: Posting must originate from governed source events and preserve lineage.

failure_condition.summary: Failure: Posting must originate from governed source events and preserve lineage.

anti_cheat_rules: A pass shall not rely on a report-only or UI-only financial snapshot.
A pass shall fail if the posting service is satisfied without a balanced journal and source lineage.
A pass shall fail if single-entry, silent mutation, or journal-edit-after-post behavior is possible.
A pass shall fail if posting evidence omits source type, source id, or immutable post state.

controls.title: Chart of accounts and journal immutability
controls.rule_definition: The chart of accounts shall retain governed taxonomy, code discipline, protected defaults, and journal immutability shall protect posted truth.
controls.retest_requirement: Modify a governed account and a posted journal and confirm rules block the actions.

expected_state.summary: Account classes, protected categories, and historical records must remain controlled.

failure_condition.summary: Failure: Account classes, protected categories, and historical records must remain controlled.

anti_cheat_rules: A pass shall not rely on a report-only or UI-only financial snapshot.
A pass shall fail if the chart of accounts is satisfied without a balanced journal and source lineage.
A pass shall fail if single-entry, silent mutation, or journal-edit-after-post behavior is possible.
A pass shall fail if posting evidence omits source type, source id, or immutable post state.

controls.title: Transaction posting workflows
controls.rule_definition: Business-critical workflows such as invoice, bill, payment, stock, COGS, VAT, and period-end adjustments shall create governed journals and shall not skip posting logic.
controls.retest_requirement: Run the governed workflow again and confirm the journal effect appears.

expected_state.summary: Business events must reach the journal without shortcuts or bypasses.

failure_condition.summary: Failure: Business events must reach the journal without shortcuts or bypasses.

anti_cheat_rules: A pass shall not rely on a report-only or UI-only financial snapshot.
A pass shall fail if the transaction posting is satisfied without a balanced journal and source lineage.
A pass shall fail if single-entry, silent mutation, or journal-edit-after-post behavior is possible.
A pass shall fail if posting evidence omits source type, source id, or immutable post state.

controls.title: VAT engine ownership, categorization, and compliance
controls.rule_definition: VAT calculation, classification, override control, ZATCA triggers, and future EU readiness shall remain governed and traceable.
controls.retest_requirement: Finalize the same VAT-sensitive document and confirm the VAT result matches the governed rule.

expected_state.summary: VAT treatment must be traced from line level and override decisions must be visible.

failure_condition.summary: Failure: VAT treatment must be traced from line level and override decisions must be visible.

anti_cheat_rules: A pass shall not rely on customer origin alone or on unstated tax assumptions.
A pass shall fail if the VAT resolution is satisfied without line-level VAT math and override logs.
A pass shall fail if VAT summary and VAT detail cannot be traced back to source documents.
A pass shall fail if compliance-sensitive VAT changes are not visible in the evidence set.

controls.title: Financial reporting truth and drill-down
controls.rule_definition: Trial balance, ledger, P&L, balance sheet, VAT reports, aged balances, invoice registers, and payment registers shall reflect posted truth and support drill-down.
controls.retest_requirement: Generate the same report again and confirm all numbers drill down to source truth.

expected_state.summary: Reports must remain read-only, ledger-derived, and drill-down capable.

failure_condition.summary: Failure: Reports must remain read-only, ledger-derived, and drill-down capable.

anti_cheat_rules: A pass shall not rely on independently computed totals outside the governed ledger or engine outputs.
A pass shall fail if the report truth is satisfied without drill-down to the source record or journal.
A pass shall fail if report totals hide imbalance, missing postings, or unresolved reconciliation deltas.
A pass shall fail if report evidence cannot identify its upstream source truth.

controls.title: Reporting engine read-only truth and drill-down
controls.rule_definition: Reporting shall remain read-only, derive only from accounting, VAT, and inventory truth, and every number shall drill down to source records.
controls.retest_requirement: Generate the same report again and confirm it remains read-only and traceable.

expected_state.summary: Fallback controls require explicit completion rather than inferred success.

failure_condition.summary: Failure: Fallback controls require explicit completion rather than inferred success.

anti_cheat_rules: A pass shall not rely on cached, mocked, or preview-only governance output.
A pass shall fail if a lower-precedence artifact wins the fallback check.
A pass shall fail if source clause evidence is missing, inferred, or copied without traceability.
A pass shall fail if the check is declared complete without a visible conflict-resolution record.

controls.title: Reconciliation continuous verification
controls.rule_definition: Reconciliation shall continuously verify journal versus report, stock versus accounting, and VAT versus invoices with explicit mismatch outcomes.
controls.retest_requirement: Re-run the same reconciliation cycle and confirm the mismatch state is explicit.

expected_state.summary: Mismatch visibility must be explicit across journal, stock, and VAT comparisons.

failure_condition.summary: Failure: Mismatch visibility must be explicit across journal, stock, and VAT comparisons.

anti_cheat_rules: A pass shall not rely on one-side matching or a partial dataset.
A pass shall fail if the cross-module reconciliation is satisfied without explicit equality or explicit mismatch reporting.
A pass shall fail if any reconciliation target is omitted from the evidence set.
A pass shall fail if mismatch visibility is suppressed to produce a false clean pass.

controls.title: Rule-based intelligence guidance and anomaly warnings
controls.rule_definition: The intelligence layer shall provide rule-based suggestions, input guidance, behavior memory, and anomaly warnings without inventing product truth.
controls.retest_requirement: Enter the same pattern and confirm the rule-based suggestion repeats consistently.

expected_state.summary: Suggestions must remain rule-backed and anomaly aware without autonomous decision making.

failure_condition.summary: Failure: Suggestions must remain rule-backed and anomaly aware without autonomous decision making.

anti_cheat_rules: A pass shall not rely on an autonomous guess or unbacked model output.
A pass shall fail if the rule-based intelligence is satisfied without a visible rule or pattern source.
A pass shall fail if anomaly warnings are suppressed, hidden, or converted into silent success.
A pass shall fail if the system suggests a path that cannot be traced to a governing rule.

controls.title: Inventory truth and movement-only changes
controls.rule_definition: Inventory shall be controlled quantity and value truth, and no stock change may occur outside the movement engine.
controls.retest_requirement: Create the same stock-changing event and verify a movement record is created.

expected_state.summary: Inventory truth must change only through governed movements.

failure_condition.summary: Failure: Inventory truth must change only through governed movements.

anti_cheat_rules: A pass shall not rely on manual stock edits or UI-only quantity adjustments.
A pass shall fail if the inventory truth is satisfied without movement logs, cost layers, and accounting linkage.
A pass shall fail if quantity, valuation, or COGS values are inferred instead of observed.
A pass shall fail if stock or valuation differences are hidden behind a summary only.

controls.title: Item model, cost, VAT category, and stock tracking
controls.rule_definition: Item records shall carry governed item types, cost, selling price, VAT category, unit, and stock-tracked state where applicable.
controls.retest_requirement: Save the same item and verify required fields are enforced.

expected_state.summary: Item identity, cost, VAT category, and tracking flags must all be present and consistent.

failure_condition.summary: Failure: Item identity, cost, VAT category, and tracking flags must all be present and consistent.

anti_cheat_rules: A pass shall not rely on manual stock edits or UI-only quantity adjustments.
A pass shall fail if the item model is satisfied without movement logs, cost layers, and accounting linkage.
A pass shall fail if quantity, valuation, or COGS values are inferred instead of observed.
A pass shall fail if stock or valuation differences are hidden behind a summary only.

controls.title: Stock movement logging and negative stock control
controls.rule_definition: Every movement type shall be logged, quantity shall never be undefined, and negative stock rules shall be explicit and enforced.
controls.retest_requirement: Repeat the movement scenario and confirm the log and quantity are present.

expected_state.summary: Every inventory movement must be logged with explicit quantity and policy state.

failure_condition.summary: Failure: Every inventory movement must be logged with explicit quantity and policy state.

anti_cheat_rules: A pass shall not rely on manual stock edits or UI-only quantity adjustments.
A pass shall fail if the stock movement is satisfied without movement logs, cost layers, and accounting linkage.
A pass shall fail if quantity, valuation, or COGS values are inferred instead of observed.
A pass shall fail if stock or valuation differences are hidden behind a summary only.

controls.title: Valuation, COGS, and accounting linkage
controls.rule_definition: Stock valuation shall use governed layers, COGS shall be generated automatically on sale, and inventory accounting linkage shall remain synchronized.
controls.retest_requirement: Sell the same stock item and confirm valuation and COGS remain synchronized.

expected_state.summary: Valuation layers and COGS must reconcile to accounting linkage.

failure_condition.summary: Failure: Valuation layers and COGS must reconcile to accounting linkage.

anti_cheat_rules: A pass shall not rely on manual stock edits or UI-only quantity adjustments.
A pass shall fail if the valuation and COGS is satisfied without movement logs, cost layers, and accounting linkage.
A pass shall fail if quantity, valuation, or COGS values are inferred instead of observed.
A pass shall fail if stock or valuation differences are hidden behind a summary only.

controls.title: Employee system controlled identity
controls.rule_definition: Every employee shall have controlled identity fields, active/inactive state, and no orphan employee record shall exist.
controls.retest_requirement: Save the employee record again and confirm the required fields remain enforced.

expected_state.summary: Employee identity must stay controlled and non-orphaned.

failure_condition.summary: Failure: Employee identity must stay controlled and non-orphaned.

anti_cheat_rules: A pass shall not rely on an orphan employee record or a salary stub without identity fields.
A pass shall fail if the employee identity is satisfied without role, department, and salary structure evidence.
A pass shall fail if the employee entity can exist without a controlled identifier.
A pass shall fail if the evidence set omits lifecycle state for the employee record.

controls.title: Attendance basis and payroll auditability
controls.rule_definition: Attendance, work hours, overtime, and absence shall be tracked and payroll shall not proceed without attendance basis.
controls.retest_requirement: Attempt payroll with the same attendance set and confirm the basis is enforced.

expected_state.summary: Payroll must be grounded in auditable attendance evidence.

failure_condition.summary: Failure: Payroll must be grounded in auditable attendance evidence.

anti_cheat_rules: A pass shall not rely on payroll output alone when attendance is required as the basis.
A pass shall fail if the attendance basis is satisfied without auditable edits or attendance provenance.
A pass shall fail if attendance edits can be made without retaining the change trail.
A pass shall fail if payroll can proceed without the declared attendance basis.

controls.title: Payroll engine period logic and journal generation
controls.rule_definition: Payroll shall be period-based, include governed salary structure, and shall not generate without attendance basis.
controls.retest_requirement: Recalculate payroll for the same period and verify the period and attendance constraints hold.

expected_state.summary: Payroll must remain period-based, attendance-grounded, and journal-linked.

failure_condition.summary: Failure: Payroll must remain period-based, attendance-grounded, and journal-linked.

anti_cheat_rules: A pass shall not rely on a payroll screen or payslip snapshot without accounting linkage.
A pass shall fail if the payroll journal linkage is satisfied without attendance basis, journal output, and period evidence.
A pass shall fail if payroll can be posted or closed without a generated journal record.
A pass shall fail if standalone payroll or unlogged salary override behavior is possible.

controls.title: Payroll accounting integration and journal posting
controls.rule_definition: Payroll shall generate journals, salary expense, payroll payable, and cash or bank impact, and standalone payroll shall be forbidden.
controls.retest_requirement: Post the payroll run again and confirm the journal entries are generated.

expected_state.summary: Payroll must remain period-based, attendance-grounded, and journal-linked.

failure_condition.summary: Failure: Payroll must remain period-based, attendance-grounded, and journal-linked.

anti_cheat_rules: A pass shall not rely on a payroll screen or payslip snapshot without accounting linkage.
A pass shall fail if the payroll journal linkage is satisfied without attendance basis, journal output, and period evidence.
A pass shall fail if payroll can be posted or closed without a generated journal record.
A pass shall fail if standalone payroll or unlogged salary override behavior is possible.
